testcase.name: test_scoping_flow

failure.message: AssertionError: Manager sees foreign customer: {'name': 'TEST Farmer d6dbc4', 'mobile': '9865718748', 'alt_mobile': '', 'village': 'TestV', 'taluk': '', 'district': '', 'address': '', 'gst': '', 'remarks': '', 'photo': '', 'id': '56ccc7a3-a3ba-4558-88dc-042c02cb289b', 'code': 'C0004', 'created_at': '2026-07-12T05:23:15.740621+00:00', 'created_by': 'b4cf89cd-bc72-4f29-ad98-35d2f90590c7', 'updated_at': '2026-07-12T05:23:15.740632+00:00', 'updated_by': 'b4cf89cd-bc72-4f29-ad98-35d2f90590c7'} assert None == '2859e080-6dc8-4ced-ac2d-5330a535cb94' + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfc21fb716280>('branch_id') + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfc21fb716280> = {'name': 'TEST Farmer d6dbc4', 'mobile': '9865718748', 'alt_mobile': '', 'village': 'TestV', ...}.get

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_ethree_iter2.py:341: in test_scoping_flow assert c.get("branch_id") == branch_id, f"Manager sees foreign customer: {c}" E AssertionError: Manager sees foreign customer: {'name': 'TEST Farmer d6dbc4', 'mobile': '9865718748', 'alt_mobile': '', 'village': 'TestV', 'taluk': '', 'district': '', 'address': '', 'gst': '', 'remarks': '', 'photo': '', 'id': '56ccc7a3-a3ba-4558-88dc-042c02cb289b', 'code': 'C0004', 'created_at': '2026-07-12T05:23:15.740621+00:00', 'created_by': 'b4cf89cd-bc72-4f29-ad98-35d2f90590c7', 'updated_at': '2026-07-12T05:23:15.740632+00:00', 'updated_by': 'b4cf89cd-bc72-4f29-ad98-35d2f90590c7'} E assert None == '2859e080-6dc8-4ced-ac2d-5330a535cb94' E + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfc21fb716280>('branch_id') E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfc21fb716280> = {'name': 'TEST Farmer d6dbc4', 'mobile': '9865718748', 'alt_mobile': '', 'village': 'TestV', ...}.get
